processing_notes: Synthetic Markdown input; no PDF extraction limitations.

issues.issue_title: Photon energy formula missing factor of c

sources.description: Photon energy follows from E = h nu and nu = c/lambda.

issues.check: Photon energy is E = h nu and nu = c/lambda, so E = hc/lambda. The expression h/lambda has dimensions of momentum, not energy.
issues.suggested_replacement_prose: Replace the original expression with E = hc/lambda unless the text explicitly declares c = 1.
issues.human_review_note: Check whether the surrounding text declares natural units.

issues.issue_title: Inverse-Compton-to-synchrotron power ratio lacks Thomson-regime qualifier

sources.description: The simple total-power ratio is a Thomson-regime approximation and is modified by Klein-Nishina suppression at high energies.

issues.original: P_IC / P_syn = U_rad / U_B, valid at all photon energies.
issues.check: The ratio is valid as a simple total-power scaling in the Thomson regime. At high energies, Klein-Nishina effects alter the inverse-Compton cross section and spectrum.
issues.corrected_version: In the Thomson regime, P_IC / P_syn = U_rad / U_B for the same electron population; at high energies, Klein-Nishina corrections are required.
issues.suggested_replacement_prose: Add the regime qualifier and remove the claim of validity at all photon energies.
issues.human_review_note: Check whether later sections introduce Klein-Nishina corrections.

issues.issue_title: Gamma-ray observing statement ignores ground-based indirect VHE/UHE detection

sources.description: Atmospheric opacity prevents direct detection of primary gamma rays from the ground but enables indirect air-shower detection at very high energies.

issues.original: All gamma rays must be detected by space telescopes because Earth's atmosphere is opaque to gamma rays.
issues.check: The statement is too broad. Low-to-medium energy gamma rays require space-based detectors, but VHE/UHE gamma rays can be detected indirectly from the ground.
issues.corrected_version: X-rays and low-to-medium energy gamma rays usually require space-based telescopes; VHE/UHE gamma rays can be detected indirectly from the ground through atmospheric showers, Cherenkov light, or particle arrays.
issues.suggested_replacement_prose: Distinguish direct space-based detection from indirect ground-based detection.
issues.human_review_note: Check consistency with any later discussion of ground-based gamma-ray facilities.

issues.issue_title: Detector area incorrectly given in cubic kilometres

sources.description: Area has dimensions of length squared, whereas km^3 is a volume.

issues.original: IceCube-Gen2 will increase the detector area to about 8 km^3.
issues.check: An area cannot be measured in cubic kilometres. The intended quantity is likely an instrumented volume.
issues.corrected_version: IceCube-Gen2 will increase the instrumented volume to about 8 km^3.
issues.suggested_replacement_prose: Replace detector area with instrumented volume if 8 km^3 is the intended quantity.
issues.human_review_note: If the surrounding discussion concerns effective area or sensitivity, state that separately.

chapter_summary.overall_judgement: The synthetic chapter contains four deliberate issues and one correct negative-control statement.
